title: Feature: Structured CLI Table Output via tabled
description: Add tabled crate and shared fmt module. Migrate all manual println table formatting to derive-based structured tables with consistent hex branding.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Add tabled dependency and create shared fmt module

phases.name: Agent + Task Commands
phases.description: Migrate agent list/info, task list, plan list

phases.name: Status + Misc Commands
phases.description: Migrate status, inference, test trends, git branches

steps.description: Add tabled dependency to hex-cli/Cargo.toml. Create hex-cli/src/fmt.rs with: HexTable wrapper that applies consistent styling, compact/default/status themes via tabled::settings, helper functions for colored status badges and truncation.
Migrate hex-cli/src/commands/adr.rs: replace manual println tables in list/status/search/abandoned with #[derive(Tabled)] row structs rendered through HexTable.
Migrate hex-cli/src/commands/agent.rs (agent list/info), plan.rs (plan list/status), and any task list output to use Tabled derives.
Migrate hex-cli/src/commands/inference.rs, test.rs, stdb.rs, git_cmd.rs, and report.rs table output to use Tabled derives.
